Anchor boundary logic with deterministic comparison operators to prevent stochastic resolution near thresholds."},{"pattern_name":"salary_threshold_systematic_upward_bias","frequency":"4/28 runs","example_run_ids":["R-013","R-014","R-020","R-021"],"root_cause":"New model consistently misclassifies salaries at 52nd-54th percentile as 'above_market' in 2 of 3 runs (P-605, P-608).
